Title: Background Color Hex Code Blue Block T-Shirt
Description:
Showcase your favorite color or design concept with this vibrant blue block t-shirt. Featuring the hexadecimal color code for a striking background, this shirt is perfect for artists, web developers, graphic designers, or anyone who appreciates color theory and minimalist aesthetics.

Design Details: The graphic prominently displays 'Background. color' along with the hex codes #3498b and #fff, making it a stylish nod to digital design and color palettes.

Material & Feel: Printed on a comfortable, breathable cotton blend tee. The soft fabric ensures all-day wearability, while the vibrant print remains durable and easy to wash.

Gift Idea: This unique piece makes an excellent gift for students, tech enthusiasts, color experts, or anyone who loves a witty, design-forward statement piece. Pair it with jeans or shorts for a casual, creative look.
